# Open Design Guard MCP

Paid remote MCP for agent design system guard MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://opendesignguard.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://opendesignguard.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://opendesignguard.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/open-design-guard-mcp

Use case: agent design system guard MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_design_guard, explain_design_gap, issue_design_receipt, suggest_agent_fix, export_design_audit
